text: Inside this modern, brightly lit space, I feel a visceral curiosity mingled with a trace of disorientation. The concept of R+D—responsive and rapidly evolving—prompts me to reflect on the fluid boundaries between knowledge and experience. The poetic text about confusion, flickering purpose, and the comfort of ambiguity resonates with me. I feel both a part of the experiment and its observer, reminded that meaning often emerges only after the fact. In this cocoon of innovation and introspection, I sense the pulse of humankind striving to coexist with something larger and more unknowable.
